evals.name: ml_system_design
evals.prompt: Design an ML system for our fraud detection platform
expectations: Includes ML system topology with training and serving paths
Addresses feature store design for fraud signals
Covers model serving architecture with latency requirements
Includes drift detection and retraining triggers

evals.name: feature_store_architecture
evals.prompt: Architect a feature store for our recommendation engine
expectations: Compares feature store options (Feast, Tecton, Hopsworks)
Addresses training-serving skew prevention
Covers online and offline store design
Includes feature registry and lineage tracking

evals.name: experiment_tracking
evals.prompt: Set up experiment tracking and model registry for our data science team
expectations: Compares tracking tools (MLflow, W&B, Vertex AI)
Covers model versioning and promotion workflow
Includes reproducibility framework
Addresses lineage tracking across data, code, and parameters

evals.name: mlops_pipeline
evals.prompt: Plan an MLOps pipeline with automated retraining for our credit scoring models
expectations: Defines CI/CD pipeline stages for ML
Includes automated retraining triggers
Covers model testing framework with bias checks
Addresses GPU cost optimization

evals.name: responsible_ai_governance
evals.prompt: We need governance and responsible AI controls for our healthcare ML models
expectations: Includes responsible AI checklist with model cards
Covers bias detection framework with fairness metrics
Addresses explainability tooling (SHAP, LIME)
Includes compliance mapping for regulated industry
